prompt: logInvalidGitTreePath logs via slog.Warn, which bypasses the repo’s cli/logging package (and can end up on stderr rather than in .entire/logs/). Consider routing this through logging.Warn (e.g., with context.Background() or by threading a ctx into callers) to keep operational logs consistent with the rest of the codebase (see cmd/entire/cli/checkpoint/committed.go where warnings go through logging.Warn).
